channel.title: Resume on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Resume on Pi Stack

item.title: Reactive Resume: The Best Self-Hosted Resume Builder in 2026
item.description: Building a professional resume usually means uploading your data to cloud platforms like Canva, Novoresume, or Zety. These services collect your personal information, work history, and career details — data that many commercial resume builders monetize or share with third parties. Reactive Resume offers a different approach: a completely free, open-source, self-hosted resume builder that keeps your data private and under your control.
